content.text: Apply bugfix-4: Closed the remaining audit gaps by enforcing single-use attendance QR tokens, adding cross-day attendance business-date handling, scoping KPI access for store managers, wiring a shared-dashboard frontend route, and making the default Docker backend test run include PostgreSQL locking coverage.

Closed the remaining audit gaps by enforcing single-use attendance QR tokens, adding cross-day attendance business-date handling, scoping KPI access for store managers, wiring a shared-dashboard frontend route, and making the default Docker backend test run include PostgreSQL locking coverage.

Changes applied:
### Attendance anti-fraud and cross-day rules
- Added single-use QR consumption with persisted used_at tracking so replayed attendance tokens are rejected.
- Added cross_day_shift_cutoff_hour to attendance rules and used it to resolve business_date for overnight shifts.
- Extended attendance schemas and admin/attendance UI surfaces to carry the new cross-day rule and show resolved business dates.
Files: fullstack/backend/app/db/models/attendance.py, fullstack/backend/app/schemas/attendance.py, fullstack/backend/app/services/attendance_service.py, fullstack/backend/alembic/versions/20260328_0010_attendance_qr_cross_day.py, fullstack/frontend/src/services/attendance.ts, fullstack/frontend/src/views/app/AdminSecurityView.vue, fullstack/frontend/src/views/app/AttendanceView.vue

### Manager KPI store isolation
- Added store-scope resolution in KPI backfill and metrics endpoints.
- Store managers can now only request their assigned store; cross-store KPI reads/backfills return 403.
- Preserved administrator multi-store access.
Files: fullstack/backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/operations.py

### Shared-dashboard frontend route/render flow
- Added shared dashboard API client typing and fetch helper.
- Added public /shared/:token route and a read-only shared dashboard view rendering totals, store breakdown, and rows.
- Added frontend analytics service test coverage for shared dashboard payload loading.
Files: fullstack/frontend/src/services/analytics.ts, fullstack/frontend/src/services/analytics.spec.ts, fullstack/frontend/src/router/index.ts, fullstack/frontend/src/views/shared/SharedDashboardView.vue

### Default PostgreSQL transactional coverage in test path
- Injected POSTGRES_TEST_DATABASE_URL into the default backend-tests Docker service so PostgreSQL locking tests run in the standard backend container execution.
- Simplified the Docker test runner because the default backend test pass now carries the PostgreSQL locking suite automatically.
- Updated README test notes to document that default backend Docker tests include the PostgreSQL locking/concurrency suite.
Files: fullstack/docker-compose.yml, fullstack/run-tests.sh, fullstack/README.md

### Compile-path cleanup
- Removed the stale extractError call in CampaignsView and routed load failures through the existing notifyError helper so the frontend build succeeds.
Files: fullstack/frontend/src/views/app/CampaignsView.vue

Tests added:
- fullstack/backend/tests/test_attendance_flow.py::test_attendance_rejects_replayed_qr_token
- fullstack/backend/tests/test_attendance_flow.py::test_attendance_cross_day_shift_uses_prior_business_date
- fullstack/backend/tests/test_ops_kpi.py::test_store_manager_cannot_access_other_store_kpi_data
- fullstack/frontend/src/services/analytics.spec.ts::loads a shared dashboard payload
